headline: CON EDISON DECLARES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) declared a quarterly dividend of 88.75 cents a share on its common stock, payable June 15, 2026 to stockholders of record as of May 13, 2026.
